seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon.
new_constraint: The email should be written in a casual tone, using colloquial language and slang.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon. The email should be written in a casual tone, using colloquial language and slang.
response:
Subject: 🎉 Vacation Approved! Go have some fun! 🌴

Hey [Employee Name],

Just wanted to shoot you a quick email to let you know that your vacation request for [Start Date] to [End Date] is totally good to go! 🎉

No sweat, we've got everything covered here while you're out, so you can just chill and recharge. Seriously, take this time to kick back, do whatever makes you happy, and just *unwind*. You totally deserve it! 🍹

Make sure you wrap up any super urgent stuff before you dip, and don't forget to set up your out-of-office reply.

Have an absolute blast, and we'll catch up when you're back in the swing of things.

Best,

[Your Name]<turn|>
